notes: Package includes manifest, evaluation scenarios, validated results, readiness review, deployment package, and marketing readiness artifacts required by the repository delivery contract.
Authority sources are real public official Microsoft, Box, and Google references with publisher, authority reason, refresh interval, decay policy, and review date recorded in the manifest.
Structured evidence supports the validated claim with 12 scenarios, 1.00 pass rate, empty regressions list, and recorded human verification.
Shared meta-agent delegation is documented with specialist-owned sections, delegated sections, request contracts, and explicit unavailable, stale, and low-confidence fallback behavior.
